What We Do

Full-Scope Traffic
Management Services

From planning approvals to on-site control, we manage every aspect of traffic safety so your project runs on time.

📋
Traffic Management Planning

We prepare and implement Traffic Management Plans (TMPs) and Traffic Control Plans (TCPs) in full compliance with regulatory requirements, identifying risks and minimising disruption.

🏛️
Council & Authority Liaison

We handle all correspondence with councils, Transport NSW, and relevant authorities — including ROLs (Road Occupancy Licences) — so you don't have to.

👷
Qualified Traffic Controllers

Our certified controllers direct vehicle and pedestrian movements, manage safe work zone access, and maintain clear communication between road users and site personnel.

🚧
Work Zone Safety

We implement traffic guidance systems, safe exclusion zones, and continuous monitoring of traffic flow, reducing risks for both workers and the public.

🎪
Events Traffic Management

From small community events to large-scale gatherings of 70+ controllers, we manage all traffic operations with precision planning and real-time coordination.

⚡
Emergency & Short-Notice Response

We understand urgent timelines. Our team can rapidly deploy traffic control services to secure sites quickly without delays to critical works.

About Us

Safety First.
Always.

At Valkyrie Traffic Management, we believe traffic control is about more than managing vehicles. It's about protecting people, supporting communities, and ensuring work zones operate safely and efficiently.

Based in Bankstown, NSW, our team of accredited Traffic Controllers, Team Leaders, and Traffic Supervisors undergo a structured competency-based assessment process to meet the highest standards of safety, communication, and professionalism.

Safety
Protecting workers, road users, and the public at all times
Integrity
Delivering services with honesty and reliability
Teamwork
Supporting each other for safe, efficient outcomes
Excellence
High standards in planning, communication, and performance
🛡️
NSW Licensed & Insured
Fully compliant with all state regulations
📜
WHS Zero Tolerance
Strict drug, alcohol & safety policies on every site
🎓
Accredited Controllers
TCWT certified with ongoing training & assessment
⚡
Rapid Deployment
Short-notice & emergency response available
🤝
End-to-End Service
Planning, approvals, execution — all under one roof
📋
Council & Authority Liaison
ROLs, TMPs, TCPs — we handle the paperwork
Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

Trusted by construction companies, event organisers, and community organisations across NSW.

VTM has been maintaining our traffic requirements for the past 4 months. They provided professional and efficient on-time service. They excelled in our latest apartment project in Fairfield and impressed both council and staff.

Zakaria Bahmed
Hogar Constructions

An event of over 70 Traffic Controllers was organised and operated smoothly from start to finish under VTM's oversight. They handled everything — plans, personnel, equipment, and all council correspondence.

Sarah Kotb
Sadaqa Organisation

From management through to the controllers on site, the team demonstrates a strong commitment to safety. Communication is clear, planning is well thought out, and the people on the ground take pride in their work.

Michael Hermiz
MetroFlow

Their controllers maintained safe and efficient vehicle and pedestrian flow throughout the event. The team was punctual, well-presented, and proactive in addressing operational requirements as they arose.

Mango Mela Multicultural Event

Clients

Join Our Team

Work With
Valkyrie TM

We're always looking for dedicated people to join our growing team across NSW.

Whether you're an experienced traffic controller or completely new to the industry, we want to hear from you. Valkyrie Traffic Management is a fast-growing company with real opportunities for career progression.

We deploy across construction sites, infrastructure projects, and major events — meaning no two days are the same. Our team is built on professionalism, safety, and looking out for each other on site.

🎓 No Experience? No Problem.

We offer in-house training and can support you in obtaining your Traffic Controller certification (TCWT card). If you're motivated and committed to safety, we'll help you get qualified and on site.
